workflow.name: Story Sizing
workflow.critical: The workflow execution engine is governed by: {project-root}/_bmad/core/tasks/workflow.xml
You MUST have already loaded and processed: {installed_path}/workflow.yaml
Communicate all responses in {communication_language} and generate all documents in {document_output_language}
STORY SIZING - Validate and Split Oversized Stories!
This workflow analyzes existing stories for context window fit and splits oversized ones
Model-aware sizing: Opus 4.6 handles larger context windows than previous models. Sizing limits updated 2026-02-05.
Historical lesson: Story 14c-refactor.22a (old model) exhausted context at >3 complex tasks. Opus 4.6 handles 8+ tasks reliably.

step.goal: Load SM agent persona and project knowledge
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-00-knowledge.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-01-select-stories.md

step.goal: Parse story content and apply sizing heuristics
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-02-parse-and-size.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-03-split-recommendations.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-04-interactive-split.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-05-execute-and-complete.md
